_note: Machine-readable tool catalog for the Minervini skill — the 'hands'. The live source of truth for exact flags/defaults is each tool's `--help`; this file is the consolidated at-a-glance spec. The conceptual SPINE/BENCH meaning and the funnel-leg routing live in SKILL.md (the 'mind'). Invoke modules by path: `python Scripts/modules/<name>.py <subcommand> SYMBOL [flags]`. Pipeline verbs: `python -m pipeline <verb> [TICKER]`.

tiers.spine: Run on every name that clears the gate — skipping one is a blind spot, not economy.
tiers.bench: Diagnostic depth, reached for only when a specific read raises a specific question.

tools.name: pipeline discover
tools.role: One no-arg read of the whole tape: breadth, RS leadership (SPY/QQQ RS, top-20 leaders, 5-day movers), sector/industry board, SPY distribution state.
tools.output: breadth-primary market_verdict (bull_early | bull_late | correction | bear); distribution only nuances early-vs-late, never gates; leadership board is yours to weigh.

tools.name: market_breadth.py breadth
tools.role: Raw breadth snapshot discover consumes (adv/decl, new-high/low, % above 50/200 SMA).
tools.output: breadth metrics only; reach for it alone if you want breadth without the leadership pull.

tools.name: pipeline qualify
tools.role: Tier-0 cheap hard gate: runs trend_template + stage_analysis + rs_ranking.
tools.output: deterministic PROCEED (both gates pass — a closer look, not a buy) | AVOID (a gate failed — stop, do not deepen). Gates: Stage==2, Trend Template 8/8 (no partial credit); RS reported but NOT a gate.

tools.name: trend_template.py check
tools.role: The 8 criteria for one ticker: per-criterion pass/fail, passed_count/8, the MAs, 52w high/low, RS.
tools.output: 8 booleans + passed_count. Thresholds definitional/fixed (52w-low×1.30, 52w-high×0.75, RS>=70, 50/150/200 SMA).

tools.name: stage_analysis.py classify
tools.role: Deterministic Stage 1-4 by a structural boolean cascade (no score, no argmax). Stage 2 is the gate's lifecycle twin.

tools.name: stage_analysis.py risk
tools.role: Sell diagnostic — the three character signals the method sells on: largest decline since Stage 2 (vs leader-correction bands), climax extension (blow-off), tennis-ball-vs-egg. Diagnostic only; no distribution-day count, no key-reversal.
tools.output: largest_decline_since_stage2, climax_extension, character + doctrine. No stop, no size.

tools.name: stage_analysis.py transitions
tools.role: Stage 1->2 early-turn (7 booleans -> strong/moderate/weak), the pre-gate read the Trend Template can't give yet. No Golden Cross.

tools.name: rs_ranking.py score
tools.role: RS rating 1-99 + spy_rs (SPY's own rating, a benchmark — NOT a relative delta) + {1w,1m,3m,6m} history for divergence.

tools.name: rs_ranking.py screen
tools.role: Screen the ~4,600-name universe for high-RS leaders.

tools.name: rs_ranking.py compare
tools.role: Rank tickers (e.g. sector peers) by RS to find the strongest.

tools.name: vcp.py detect
tools.role: Primary base read: VCP (+ Cup&Handle, 3C cheat, Power Play), graded contraction/volume/shakeout/pivot-tightness, the pivot/buy point.
tools.output: pattern + 0-100 setup_readiness (within-setup quality, NOT a verdict) + doctrine (pivot, pivot_volume_dryup, post_surge_recovery, time_symmetry).

tools.name: volume_analysis.py analyze
tools.spine_bench: spine (on a PROCEED — the demand confirmer)
tools.role: Accumulation/distribution: A-E grade (up/down volume ratio), breakout-volume confirmation, distribution clustering, climactic days, pullback-volume quality.

tools.name: volume_analysis.py demand-days
tools.role: Institutional demand days inside the base (up-day volume dwarfing the max prior down-day, upper-half close, voided by a later bigger down-day), graded + located right_side/handle/extended.

tools.name: entry_patterns.py scan
tools.invoke: python Scripts/modules/entry_patterns.py scan TICKER  (also: screen SYM...)
tools.role: Currently-active entry triggers (MA_PULLBACK, CONSOLIDATION_PIVOT, SUPPORT_RECLAIM) with trigger/stop/quality.

tools.name: tight_closes.py daily
tools.invoke: python Scripts/modules/tight_closes.py daily TICKER  (also: weekly TICKER)
tools.role: Clusters of narrow-spread closes (supply drying up near the pivot), graded by tightness + dryup + in-base location. Weekly carries higher confluence weight.

tools.name: base_count.py count
tools.role: Counts bases in the Stage-2 advance: early (1-2, optimal) vs late (4+, failure-prone); per-base pattern, relative-to-SPY correction severity, depth trend, Stage-4 reset, risk_level.

flags.--min-advance-pct: explicitly non-canonical heuristic, off by default

tools.name: earnings_acceleration.py code33
tools.role: Triple acceleration: EPS + sales + NET margin. EPS strict 3-quarter acceleration on deep earnings_dates; sales adapts to data depth (acceleration if >=3 YoY rates, else strength fallback >= --sales-min-pct); NET margin must expand 3 consecutive quarters.

flags.--margin-min-ppt: invented floor; 0 = pure-directional canonical, default 0.5 legacy

tools.name: earnings_acceleration.py acceleration / surprise / revisions
tools.role: acceleration: per-quarter EPS&sales YoY trend. surprise: beat/surprise history + post-earnings drift + cockroach bucket. revisions: analyst revision trends.

flags.--drift-days: default '1,5'; widen to '1,5,20,60' for multi-month drift

tools.name: earnings_acceleration.py valuation
tools.role: Forward-P/E barometer, explicitly NOT a gate: fwd P/E 1y/2y, whether contracting (growing into the multiple), a raw PEG scalar (years priced in, not a cheap/expensive verdict). GARP bands removed by design.

tools.name: earnings_acceleration.py margin
tools.role: Gross/op/NET margin trajectory, NET as headline, NO classification badge (the old EXPANDING/COMPRESSION flag inverted Code-33's all-legs-together logic).

tools.name: info.py
tools.role: Metadata/quotes plumbing, no judgment.

tools.name: actions.py
tools.role: Corporate actions/events plumbing, no judgment.

tools.name: utils.py
tools.role: Shared helper lib. Hosts calculate_sma and max_constructive_depth_pct (the duration-keyed depth ceiling). Listed only so you don't hunt for it as a tool.
